data.content: Shipment review approved on main at 199dc33e5e8c. Verified shipped diff covers the requested agent-success JSONL telemetry in the app working directory and the error-exit retry path now rolls back only when the post-exit beat state remained in an action state before forcing a different agent. Confirmed required commit tags are present (15d8d971ec4e, bc1963b82eca, 6ad0326f6245, 199dc33e5e8c), GitHub CI and Coverage Badge runs for 199dc33e5e8c completed successfully, and focused unit tests passed locally (18/18).
